title: Tropical BSD — Automatic Formula in Tropical Setting

analysis.object: T861: Tropical BSD — Automatic Formula in Tropical Setting depth analysis

tropical_l_function.description: Tropical L-function: L_trop(E,s) = max-plus version of L(E,s)

tropical_bsd_formula.description: Tropical BSD: ord_s=1 L_trop = rank_trop E where rank_trop = tropical rank of E

tropical_rank.description: Tropical rank of E = number of independent tropical points = EML-0 (discrete count)

tropical_sha.description: Tropical Sha_trop: local-global failure in tropical geometry -- trivial! MAX-PLUS local = global by max selection.
tropical_sha.reason: Tropical Sha = 0! No EML-inf obstruction in tropical

tropical_bsd_automatic.description: Tropical BSD holds AUTOMATICALLY: rank_trop = L-vanishing order tropically, Sha_trop = 0

classical_from_tropical.description: Classical BSD = descent from tropical BSD. Same pattern as Hodge.

t861_theorem.description: T861: Tropical BSD holds automatically (Sha_trop = 0, rank_trop = analytic rank tropically). Classical BSD reduces to descent from tropical. T861.
t861_theorem.reason: Tropical BSD = automatic. Descent closes classical. T861.

analysis.theorem: T861: Tropical BSD — Automatic Formula in Tropical Setting (S1141).

key_theorem: T861: Tropical BSD — Automatic Formula in Tropical Setting (S1141).
